calendar.matters:
Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar May-25-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard: PES_23-306008 The Estate of George R. Alston, and PTR-23-306001 in the Matter of the Elbert S. Alston living trust.

Appearance: Wendy Wayne appearing via zoom Douglas Alston (Petitioner).
Jeffrey Neustadt appearing in person for Rajarei Sumera (objector).

Mr. Neustadt stated that he withdraws objections from his client and acknowledges Mr. Alston having higher priority to serve as administrator. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Douglas B. Alston is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Status on close of estate is set for May 14, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee. The petition to appoint successor trustee is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar May-08-2023 Continued To May-23-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
